operation.name: Increment
operation.sql: INSERT INTO dialog_preference_versions (user_id, scope_kind, folder_id, aggregate_version) VALUES (:user_id, :scope_kind, :folder_id, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE aggregate_version = aggregate_version + 1

operation.name: SelectOne
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, scope_kind, folder_id, aggregate_version FROM dialog_preference_versions WHERE user_id = :user_id AND scope_kind = :scope_kind AND folder_id = :folder_id LIMIT 1
